title: ABC Chalk Book Alligator Products Ltd
features: ABC Chalk Book lets you earn the alphabet with chalkboard pages!
Fun to use again and again!
description: Have fun practising writing the letters of the alphabet in the ABC Chalk Book. Includes 3 chalks along with 7 pages that wipe clean so you can use them again and again. The colourful pictures and words help support learning. The activity pages will help to make the important connection between letter sounds, their shapes and the words they form.
